'''varaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uglifier|uglifier]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uglifier|uglifier]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| varaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væræjæth|væræjæth]] || [[word:væræjæj|væræjæj]] || [[word:væræjæsh|væræjæsh]] || [[word:væræjæ|væræjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vararajath|vararajath]] || [[word:vararajaj|vararajaj]] || [[word:vararajash|vararajash]] || [[word:vararaja|vararaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:varajath|varajath]] || [[word:varajaj|varajaj]] || [[word:varajash|varajash]] || [[word:varaja|varaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:varafjath|varafjath]] || [[word:varafjaj|varafjaj]] || [[word:varafjash|varafjash]] || [[word:varafjaf|varafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:varajatha|varajatha]] || [[word:varajaja|varajaja]] || [[word:varajasha|varajasha]] || [[word:varajaka|varajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:varajath|varajath]] || [[word:varajaj|varajaj]] || [[word:varajash|varajash]] || [[word:varaja|varaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:varajathal|varajathal]] || [[word:varajajal|varajajal]] || [[word:varajashal|varajashal]] || [[word:varajakal|varajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:varajathatha|varajathatha]] || [[word:varajajaja|varajajaja]] || [[word:varajashasha|varajashasha]] || [[word:varajaka|varajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:varajathan|varajathan]] || [[word:varajajan|varajajan]] || [[word:varajashan|varajashan]] || [[word:varajakan|varajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:varajathaoro|varajathaoro]] || [[word:varajajaoro|varajajaoro]] || [[word:varajashaoro|varajashaoro]] || [[word:varajakaoro|varajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
